name: obsidian-todo-manager
title: Obsidian Todo Manager
description: Add and manage markdown todos in your Obsidian ToDo note from Raycast.
author: williebsweet

commands.name: manage-obsidian-todos
commands.title: Manage Obsidian Todos
commands.subtitle: Obsidian
commands.description: Add, edit, complete, and delete todos in your Obsidian ToDo note.

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Obsidian Vault Folder
preferences.description: The root folder of your Obsidian vault.

preferences.name: todoNotePath
preferences.title: ToDo Note Path
preferences.description: Path to your todo note inside the vault. Relative paths are resolved from the vault root.

preferences.name: createNoteIfMissing
preferences.title: Missing Note
preferences.description: Automatically create the todo note if it does not exist yet.
preferences.label: Create the note automatically

preferences.name: newTodoPlacement
preferences.title: New Todo Placement
preferences.description: Choose where new todos should be inserted in the note.
